zh.lifeSummary: 當Brian FitzAlan於1260年出生在英國越可爾貝達爾時，他的父親Alan FitzAlan22歲，母親Agnes FitzRandolph20歲。他於大約1280年與Muriel Unknown結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1306年6月1日在他的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在英國越可爾貝達爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Brian FitzAlan于1260年出生在英国越可爾貝達爾时，他的父亲Alan FitzAlan22岁，母亲Agnes FitzRandolph20岁。他于大约1280年与Muriel Unknown结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1306年6月1日在他的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在英国越可爾貝達爾。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Brian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Irish origin: perhaps from an Old Celtic word meaning ‘high’ or ‘noble’. The name has been perennially popular in Ireland, in particular on account of the fame of Brian Boru (Gaelic Brian Bóroimhe) ( c. 940–1014 ), a warrior who was credited with driving the Vikings from Ireland and who eventually became high king of Ireland. In the Middle Ages it was relatively common in East Anglia, where it was introduced by Breton settlers, and in northern England, where it was introduced by Scandinavians from Ireland. It was quite popular in Yorkshire in the early 16th century, largely because it had long been a family name among the Stapletons, who had Irish connections. They first used it after Sir Gilbert Stapleton married Agnes , the daughter of the great northern baron Sir Brian fitzAlan . In Gaelic Scotland it was at first borne exclusively by members of certain professional families of Irish origin.

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: Variant of   Brian  , influenced by the usual spelling of the associated surname.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Brian FitzAlan was born in 1260, in Bedale, Yorkshire, England, his father, Alan FitzAlan, was 22 and his mother, Agnes FitzRandolph, was 20. He married Muriel Unknown about 1280. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 1 June 1306, in his hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in Bedale, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Brian FitzAlan est né en 1260, à Bedale, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Alan FitzAlan, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Agnes FitzRandolph, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Muriel Unknown environ 1280. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 1 juin 1306, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Bedale, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Brian FitzAlan 1260 in Bedale, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan FitzAlan 22 und seine Mutter Agnes FitzRandolph 20. Er hat um 1280 Muriel Unknown geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 1. Juni 1306 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bedale, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Brian FitzAlan è nato il nel 1260 nel Bedale, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Alan FitzAlan, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Agnes FitzRandolph, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Muriel Unknown circa 1280. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 1 giugno 1306, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Bedale, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Bedale, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアベダル
ja.lifeSummary: Brian FitzAlanが1260年にイギリスヨークシュアイアベダルで生まれた時，父Alan FitzAlanは22歳，母Agnes FitzRandolphは20歳であった。約1280年にMuriel Unknownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1306年6月1日に故郷で46歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアベダルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Brian FitzAlan(이)가 1260년 영국 요르크실르 베데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan FitzAlan(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes FitzRandolph(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1280년 Muriel Unknown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1306년 6월 1일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 베데일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Brian FitzAlan nasceu em 1260, em Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alan FitzAlan, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Agnes FitzRandolph, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Muriel Unknown aproximadamente 1280. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1 de junho de 1306, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Brian FitzAlan родился в 1260 г. в местности бедеил, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Alan FitzAlan было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes FitzRandolph, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Muriel Unknown около 1280 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 1 июня 1306 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности бедеил, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Brian FitzAlan nació en 1260, en Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alan FitzAlan, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Agnes FitzRandolph, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Muriel Unknown aproximadamente 1280. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 1 de junio de 1306, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
